Appearances:
Plaintiff Guru Krupa LLC. Represented by Hamid Mohamed.
Attorney Howard Olsen for the plaintiff.
Defendant William Rivera is present.
Attorney Bao-Tran Dang appearing for defendant in limited scope.

***Per the report of plaintiff, the defendant "fired" the limited scope attorney and walked off. Reported also by D. 502 clerk.

The Judge, litigants and counsel confer for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of January 17, 2017 remains on calendar. (501)
